## Pull Request Template 
 
- implements `Name of the feature`
- fixes `Name of the fix`

 
## Changes
 
- `first change`
- `second change`
- `fix description`

## Reviewer Section
- [ ] The changes are implemented according to the documentation
- [ ] The code is understandable and maintainable
- [ ] Edge cases are handled appropriately, all corner cases are considered
- [ ] Comments and documentation are clear and helpful
- [ ] Inputs are validated and sanitized
- [ ] Unit tests are created and cover all acceptance criteria

## Maintainer Section
- [ ] The changes are implemented according to the documentation
- [ ] The code is understandable and maintainable
- [ ] Edge cases are handled appropriately, all corner cases are considered
- [ ] Comments and documentation are clear and helpful
- [ ] Inputs are validated and sanitized
- [ ] Unit tests are created and cover all acceptance criteria
